name: Emilie's Pork Medalions Chinese Style
recipeIngredient: 6 Pork medallions trimmed of all fat
recipeInstructions:
1. Blend all ingredients (except pork) in a bowl until well combined.
2. Bring the mixture to a slow boil.
3. Reduce heat and let simmer for about 30 minutes, stirring occasionally to prevent sticking.
4. Heat oil or coat pan with pan spray.
5. Saute pork medallions until cooked through.
6. Serve with sauce, garnished with parsley.
Emilie RWSM05a
